About Us

A New Standard
for Interior Excellence

Since 2015, Ideal Kitchens Wardrobe & Hardware Ltd has been the benchmark for premium cabinetry and interior fit-outs across Zambia. We combine international design — drawing from China, France, Italy, Denmark, and Spain — with a deep understanding of the local market.

Every material we use is E-1 Core certified, meeting the European Union's environmental production standards. From concept to completion, we are your true one-stop interior solution.

10+ Years Experience
5yr Workmanship Warranty
E-1 EU Certified Materials

Residential & Commercial Fit-outs

International Design Standards

In-house Plumbing Team

Reg. No. 130988
What We Offer

Our Services

01

Kitchen Units

Lacquered, PVC, and Melamine finishes. High-gloss or matte. Custom colours and granite worktops.

LacquerPVCMelamine
02

Wardrobes

Built-in and free-standing options with frosted, glass, or panel sliding doors. Any finish, any size.

Built-inFree-standingSliding
03

Bathroom Units

Vanity units, toilet enclosures, and mirror cabinets in lacquer and moisture-resistant finishes.

VanityMirrorToilet Units
04

Metal Fabrication

Sliding gates, metal fencing, tank stands, staircase guiders in granite and stainless steel.

GatesFencingSteel
05

Aluminium Windows & Doors

Custom aluminium windows, doors, and partitions. Also Mukwa timber doors and rosewood products.

WindowsDoorsPartitions
06

Plumbing Installations

Full residential and commercial plumbing — sinks, geysers, pipe-work, bathroom and kitchen fit-outs.

ResidentialCommercialGeysers
07

Interior Design Consultancy

Space planning, colour schemes, 3D visualisations, and full fit-out design for any room or building.

Space Planning3D DesignColour
08

Commercial Counters & Furniture

Bar counters, reception desks, office workstations, school desks, garden metal furniture sets.

BarOfficeGarden
Materials & Finishes

Quality in Every Layer

Lacquer

High-gloss finish in any colour. Moisture-resistant E1-class MDF carcass. Easy to clean.

PVC

Durable matte finish with MFC carcass. Strong and easy to clean with excellent design variety.

Melamine

Flat, smooth, water-resistant with UV edge branding. Ideal for large-scale projects.

Granite & Stainless

Premium material for worktops and staircase guiders. Long-lasting beauty and durability.

Why Choose Us

The Ideal Difference

Ideal Kitchens

  • E1 European-certified boards, hardware & adhesives
  • Wide finishes: Lacquer, Melamine, PVC, Rococo & more
  • International designs from China, France, Italy & Spain
  • 5-year workmanship warranty on all kitchens & wardrobes
  • Full in-house plumbing team
  • Interior design consultancy on every project

Typical Competitors

  • Uninspected materials, no certification
  • Limited to particle board or ordinary PVC
  • Generic local market designs only
  • Typically no formal warranty offered
  • Plumbing subcontracted or unavailable
  • No design advisory service provided

After-Sales Service & Warranty

We stand behind every product. Transportation and installation damage is always our responsibility. All kitchens and wardrobes carry a full 5-year workmanship warranty. You'll receive a maintenance manual and ongoing after-care guidance.
